scripts.dev:mfe: concurrently -k -n spend,portfolio,web -c magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run remote" "npm run remote:portfolio" "npm run dev -w @bank-ai/web"
scripts.dev:real: concurrently -k -n server,spend,portfolio,web -c green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run server -w @bank-ai/server" "npm run remote" "npm run remote:portfolio" "npm run dev -w @bank-ai/web -- --mode real"
